ab: Se sa pitu toké mi ni nga ka nua ma kɨ ga ko.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: W sla te nag, singsi motane, ciausɨ so pakbaka, “icikla！su ku bu！”
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: La pe ta ra dro ke na me psobaka, “Singsi margagimusu.”
I sulte ne me dria, u buru buru nema singsi sisipi na beké na m ɨ.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the Ruaki language of numbers.

ab: Ang pa ra na mɨ singsi na sisipi, su thɨné nga na mɨ sisipi thɨné.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

ab: Madro arigwa li na makacuku nga na beka.
en: I have learned many Ruaki languages.

ab: Makavienenga mwa sulte, kbu bulu beké ta, m pso ba ka ma kɨ biciringi nina na.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the Ruaki language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
